insert into `core_news_translations` (`locale`, `origin_id`, `title`, `content`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('en', 201, 'Lan Ha Bay kayak tour', '

A Lan Ha Bay kayak tour journey is the best way to weave through the notch caves, explore quiet lagoons, and get the closest access to the magnificent limestone islands that large boats cannot reach. This experience not only brings absolute relaxation amid the tranquil nature of Lan Ha Bay but is also an effective "healing" therapy for the soul and physical training.

Why is the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour an experience not to be missed?

Lan Ha Bay, located to the south of Ha Long Bay and surrounding the Cat Ba archipelago, is known as a "forgotten paradise" with pristine beauty and a far more peaceful atmosphere than its famous neighbor. To fully appreciate this beauty, taking part in a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour is the top choice for nature lovers.

In particular, the Lan Ha Bay area has hundreds of small unnamed beaches. Only with a true Lan Ha Bay kayak tour itinerary do you get the chance to "have to yourself" a small private beach, relaxing and breathing in the sea air without being disturbed by engine noise or dust.

The ideal time to take a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour

Choosing the departure time plays a decisive role in the success of the trip. A Lan Ha Bay kayak tour will be most perfect when the weather is favorable, the sea is calm, and the sky is clear and blue.

  • From March to May (Spring): This is when the weather gradually warms up, the sky is clear, and there is little rain. This is the most ideal period for kayaking because you are neither too hot under the sun nor too cold from the sea breeze.
  • From September to November (Autumn): After the sweltering, stormy summer months, autumn brings cool air and a bay surface as smooth as a mirror. A Lan Ha Bay kayak tour at this time will help you capture extremely impressive sunset photos over the sea.
  • Summer note (June - August): Although it is the peak tourist season, storms are also frequent. If you choose a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour at this time, you need to closely monitor the weather forecast to avoid sudden thunderstorms.

 

The most beautiful spots on a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour journey

Lan Ha Bay possesses an extremely diverse system of caves and lagoons. Below are the stops that no professional Lan Ha Bay kayak tour should miss:

Bright Cave and Dark Cave (Dark and Bright Caves)

This is the area bordering Lan Ha Bay and Ha Long Bay, famous for its mysterious beauty. When taking a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour here, you will paddle through a rock cave about 100m long to enter a lagoon completely enclosed by towering cliffs. The space inside is utterly silent, with only the sound of water dripping from the stalactites, giving the feeling of being lost in another world.

The Ao Ech (Frog Pond) area

True to its name, this is a place with unique natural scenery featuring oddly shaped limestone blocks. The water surface at Ao Ech is very calm, extremely suitable for first-time Lan Ha Bay kayak tour participants. You can leisurely paddle, watching the coral reefs faintly visible beneath the clear water.

Ba Trai Dao Beach

This area consists of three small islands that look like three heavenly peaches. It is an ideal resting stop on a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour itinerary. After paddling until exhausted, you can plunge into the cool water or lie lazily on the fine white sand to enjoy the sunshine.

Cua Van and Cai Beo fishing villages

If you want to learn about local culture, steer your boat toward the ancient fishing villages. A Lan Ha Bay kayak tour through the floating houses will help you observe the daily life of the fishermen, how they raise fish in cages, and the hospitality of the seaside people.

In addition, discover more high-quality travel experiences at virenaretreat.com

How to choose a reputable Lan Ha Bay kayak tour operator?

There are currently many companies offering this service, but to have a safe and rewarding trip, you need to consider carefully. A quality Lan Ha Bay kayak tour should ensure the following factors:

  • Safety equipment: The kayak must be sturdy, the paddle light, and especially there must always be standard-quality life jackets for tourists.
  • Experienced guides: A guide who knows the terrain well will help you find the most beautiful routes and handle unexpected situations at sea. On a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour, the guide is also the person who tells you interesting stories about the bay's history and geology.
  • Commitment to environmental protection: Prioritize operators that emphasize sustainable tourism and leave no waste behind while running the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour. This aligns with the spirit of "healing" and respecting nature.
  • Flexible itinerary: Small, personalized tours often provide better emotions than mass tours with too many people.

 

Items to prepare for a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour

To fully enjoy the fun, preparing personal items is very important. When going on a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour, make sure you bring:

  • Swimwear or comfortable sportswear: Prioritize quick-drying materials because you will certainly get wet while paddling.
  • Sunscreen and a wide-brimmed hat: Sunlight reflecting off the water surface can easily cause sunburn if you get absorbed in the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour for too long.
  • Waterproof bag: This is a "vital" item to protect your phone, camera, and wallet from seawater.
  • Drinking water and snacks: Paddling consumes quite a lot of energy, so a bit of chocolate or electrolyte drink will help you maintain endurance throughout the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour route.
  • Water shoes or sandals with heel straps: They help you move easily on the boat and when stepping onto sharp rocky shores.

 

A guide to safely joining a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour for beginners

If this is your first time sitting in a kayak, do not worry too much. The process of taking a safe Lan Ha Bay kayak tour usually includes the following steps:

How to do it

Step 1: Check the equipment

Before getting into the water, check the boat and paddle again and fasten the life jacket tightly. Make sure the waterproof bag is securely sealed.

Step 2: Board the boat correctly

Keep the boat stable by asking someone to hold the side of the boat, then place your foot in the middle and lower your center of gravity to sit down slowly.

Step 3: Learn basic paddling technique

Hold the paddle so that your two hands are about shoulder-width apart. When paddling, use the strength of your abdominal and back muscles instead of just your arms to avoid tiring quickly during the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour.

Step 4: Always follow the group or the guide

Lan Ha Bay has many complex channels, so sticking closely to the route of the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour ensures you do not get lost or enter dangerous whirlpools.

Step 5: Handling a capsized boat

If you unfortunately capsize, stay calm, get out of the boat, hold onto the side of the boat, and wait for the guide to help. The life jacket will always keep you afloat on the water surface.

Frequently asked questions about Lan Ha Bay kayak tour

Is paddling on a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour difficult?

Not at all. Tourist kayaks are usually very stable double kayaks that are hard to capsize. Just 5-10 minutes of getting used to it and you can confidently control the boat on your Lan Ha Bay kayak tour.

Can children take part in a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour?

Absolutely. Children usually sit in the middle of the double kayak with their parents. However, make sure the child always wears a life jacket and is closely supervised throughout the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour.

How much time is needed for a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour?

Depending on your fitness and preferences, you can choose a half-day tour (2-3 hours of paddling) or a full-day tour combined with visiting more distant islands. Most travelers choose a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour of about 2 hours, which is enough to feel the beauty of the bay.

Will I get wet on a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour?

Definitely yes. Water from the paddle or small waves will get your clothes wet. So, wear swimwear and prepare a dry set of clothes to change into after finishing the Lan Ha Bay kayak tour.

Do you need to know how to swim to join a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour?

It is not required. Because you always wear a life jacket throughout the paddling, even if you cannot swim, you can still take part in a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour safely under the guidance of an expert.

The Lan Ha Bay kayak tour journey

Exploring Lan Ha Bay by kayak is not just a simple sightseeing trip, but a journey to reconnect with yourself through nature. A well-planned Lan Ha Bay kayak tour will give you priceless memories and unique perspectives that no other means can offer. Let the sound of the waves, the breeze, and the pristine beauty of the bay help you recharge after tiring workdays.

If you are looking for a green, sustainable, and inspiring travel experience, do not hesitate to sign up right away for a Lan Ha Bay kayak tour. This is the key to opening the gateway into the heart of this most beautiful bay in the world.
